'''Cisgat''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] who [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] met in the [[Bet's Off]] [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]] on the [[Jubilee Wheel (space station)|''Jubilee Wheel'']] in [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]]. He was trying to secure passage to [[Rhinnal/Legends|Rhinnal]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
